name: Azlund
epithet: of the House of Healing, whose oath bound the road

name: Tessa
epithet: who walked the company down to the docks where the Horizon was moored

name: Rindal
epithet: first mate of the Horizon, whose tour named the crew

name: Captain Brennan
epithet: veteran of the Nyanzaru run, who gave them a cloak of billowing for six ropes held

name: Pip
epithet: cook of the Horizon, who minded the cheese and would not be lied to

name: Corwin, called Artus Cimber
epithet: who hid his name in a glove and a ring, and turned alone to the pirates so the company might live

name: Dragonbait
epithet: saurial of many scents, who held the prow when the sahuagin came

name: Harlen
epithet: Zhentarim spy, the wrong sailor, the cheese-thief, now chained to the galley wall

name: The Fleeing Yuan-ti
epithet: whose blade nearly took Urida, and who fled before the reckoning
